name: run_tests
description: Runs automated tests for the project using a specified test runner command (e.g., jest, pytest, go test). Returns test results, including pass/fail status, stdout, and stderr.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project.

command.description: The test runner command to execute (e.g., 'npm test', 'pytest -v', 'go test ./...').

working_directory.description: Optional subdirectory within project_path where the command should be run. Defaults to project_path itself.

coverage.description: If true, and the test runner supports it, attempt to generate code coverage reports. The command itself should reflect this intent if necessary (e.g. by including a '--coverage' flag).

hints.description: Runs tests. Generally non-destructive, but the specific test command could potentially have side effects if not written carefully.
